overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a Divination classroom in a gothic castle, featuring stone walls, arched windows with purple curtains, and mystical props arranged in a circular layout. The camera remains stationary throughout as an NPC student walks across the room filled with antique desks and crystal balls.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a gothic-style Divination classroom with stone walls and tall arched windows draped in purple curtains. Natural light filters through the windows, illuminating a circular patterned rug surrounded by antique wooden desks and crystal balls. An NPC student in a dress enters from the left at around 8 seconds, walks across the center of the room, and exits to the right, while the camera remains stationary throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary view of a gothic Divination classroom that remains still as a lone figure traverses the mystical space. It begins with a wide look at the stone walls and tall arched windows, where natural light filters through purple curtains to illuminate a circular patterned rug. As the light catches the antique wooden desks and crystal balls arranged around the room, an NPC student in a dress enters from the left. The camera holds its position as the student walks steadily across the center of the room, before finally exiting to the right and leaving the quiet, atmospheric classroom once again to its stillness.
